properties.name: Feature: 3.5E/PFRPG ADV/DIS & Modifier Buttons
properties.author: Kerry Harrison (sirkerry)
properties.description: Adds 5E-style modifier stack buttons (ADV/DIS, +2/-2, +5/-5) to the 3.5E and PFRPG desktop. REQUIRES "Feature: Extended Automation" (by rhythmist et al.) to be loaded - that extension is what actually applies Advantage/Disadvantage to the dice when the ADV/DIS buttons are clicked; this extension only supplies the buttons plus the +2/-2/+5/-5 numeric modifier engine, neither of which exist in stock 3.5E/PFRPG.

announcement.text: 3.5E/PFRPG ADV/DIS & Modifier Buttons - Version 1.0 by sirkerry - requires Feature: Extended Automation
